notes: Default gameplay profile. Generate a fresh source strip for each job with at least 128px empty space between neighboring visible poses before cleanup/repack. Keep the visible character comfortably inside the frame; no body, sword, scarf, shadow, glow, or alpha haze may touch the frame edge.

Use for attack and special rows. Generate a fresh source strip for each job with at least 384px empty space between neighboring visible poses before cleanup/repack. The oversized square canvas is mandatory for weapon arcs, impact flashes, detached effect islands, and special effects. Normalize action rows with one fixed character/source scale across the whole animation; do not fit each frame independently.
